task_details.task_name: Humanly N4 Long AI-draft light editing
task_details.task_introduction:
You will edit one long AI-generated draft. The purpose is to collect examples where AI supplied the substantive draft and a person made light local improvements.

Do not use ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, AI rewriting tools, humanizer tools, machine translation, or any other AI text-generation system while completing this task.
task_details.task_steps:
1. Read the task prompt and the AI draft.
  2. Lightly edit the AI draft for clarity, grammar, repetition, local flow, and awkward wording.
  3. Keep the main ideas, examples, structure, and overall meaning from the draft.
  4. Paste only the final edited text into the answer box.
  5. Confirm that you completed the edit yourself without using additional AI tools.

instructions.description: Paste your edited final text here.
instructions.helper_text: Paste only the final edited response. Do not include notes, explanations, labels, or markdown. Stay close to the target word range shown in the task.

instructions.description: Confirm that you edited the draft yourself without using additional AI tools.
instructions.helper_text: This includes ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, AI rewriting tools, humanizer tools, and machine translation.

options.label: I confirm that I edited this myself without using additional AI tools.

study.name: Humanly N4 Long AI-draft light editing
study.description:
In this study, you will edit one AI-generated draft. Please make light local improvements while preserving the draft's meaning and structure.

You should not use AI tools or outside rewriting tools while completing the edit.
